## [12:07 - 15:11]

but very much the same in the sense that people are going to comment. People are going to send you messages. In fact, Instagram tends to be a space where people will message you directly more than they come into your comments sometimes. Depending on the content you're creating, you will find people showing up and saying, how do you do that? How do I do this? What are you doing now? And they just come in and they want to know more from you. They want to learn from you. So it is very much important that you interact back with them. And you're going to see a couple of ways you can interact with them. With Instagram in particular, people are going to send you messages. When you go into your messaging, you want to respond. If they're like, gosh, I really needed to hear that today. Or, hey, I saw your post from this, from today. And it really resonated with me. Follow up because these are warm leads. When someone is sending you a message, they are revealing they are your ideal client. When someone is commenting on your post, they are revealing they are your ideal client. These are warm leads. And they all come to you through the power of the hashtag. They all come to you when you're, you're tagging these, these topic points. And they're like, gosh, I love that. I needed that. And they look to you as the expert. So it's important that when people follow you, that you send them a message. It can be a quick message of, hey, thanks for the ad. I really appreciate you coming into my space. Was there something I could support you in? Or what resonated with you? You do not need to follow back every single person that adds you. In fact, I would encourage you to not follow every single person that adds you. Because you can gain a lot of followers on Instagram. But it's, it's not the same as Facebook. On Instagram, if you follow somebody, you're going to see everything that they post in their content and they may not always be the ideal client when they're following you. So keep that in mind when you're seeing new followers come in and know that the people that are commenting on your posts are more likely to be the ideal client than every single follower that's following you. And the hashtags are going to attract a lot of different people. That's why we see larger numbers on Instagram. ## [15:12 - 17:34]

I need more followers. I need more people to see my stuff. I care about the following. But then I realized that there was a consistent about 100, 150 people that were constantly liking my content. And I was in the health and wellness space. I was in the transformation space. So I was constantly sharing my story and using the hashtags that were relevant to transformation. If you're open, I would love to get on a call this week and we can talk about how I can support or you can send them your lead magnet.
